# pihole_client (Data Source)

Fetches a single client by its identifier.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pihole_client" "desktop" {
  client = "192.168.1.100"
}

output "desktop_groups" {
  value = data.pihole_client.desktop.groups
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client` (String) The client identifier (IP, MAC, CIDR, or hostname) to look up.

### Read-Only

- `comment` (String) Comment for the client.
- `groups` (List of Number) List of group IDs the client belongs to.
- `id` (String) The client identifier.
